name: from
title: From
description: Capture thoughts, search your notes and open your daily note in From — the outliner that understands what you write, so capture stays frictionless and fast.
author: alberto_lezaun

commands.name: create
commands.title: Create in from
commands.subtitle: From
commands.description: Jot down a thought and From files it in today's note as a note, task or event — figuring out the type and date for you, so you just write.

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search from
commands.subtitle: From
commands.description: Full-text search across your entire From vault and open any note in the Mac app or on the web.

commands.name: today
commands.title: Open Today's Note
commands.subtitle: From
commands.description: Jump straight to your daily note in From.

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: API Token
preferences.description: Your From API token. In From: Settings → Quick capture → Raycast → Copy token.
